mapper.sql: id, name, model, manufacturer, serial_number, drone_type, max_flight_time_minutes, max_speed_kmh, max_altitude_meters, payload_capacity_kg, battery_capacity_mah, status, ai_profile, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drones ( name, model, manufacturer, serial_number, drone_type, max_flight_time_minutes, max_speed_kmh, max_altitude_meters, payload_capacity_kg, battery_capacity_mah, status, ai_profile, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{model}, #{manufacturer}, #{serialNumber}, #{droneType}, #{maxFlightTimeMinutes}, #{maxSpeedKmh}, #{maxAltitudeMeters}, #{payloadCapacityKg}, #{batteryCapacityMah}, #{status}, #{aiProfile}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE drones SET name = #{name}, model = #{model}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, drone_type = #{droneType}, max_flight_time_minutes = #{maxFlightTimeMinutes}, max_speed_kmh = #{maxSpeedKmh}, max_altitude_meters = #{maxAltitudeMeters}, payload_capacity_kg = #{payloadCapacityKg}, battery_capacity_mah = #{batteryCapacityMah}, status = #{status}, ai_profile = #{aiProfile}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
